description: Style NoteStylish and sweet without looking overtly grown-up, this pair is perfect for the teen who likes to stay abreast of the latest fashion trends. This pair is just right for the latest season's style with pastel shades dominating the ensemble!Product DetailsBrown sandal with pink leather criss-cross straps at the forefoot, a toe separator and backfoot strap with a buckle closurePadded footbed with brandingTextured outsole with a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
